caption: A man with a shaved head, a full dark beard, and tattoos on his right arm is recorded in a studio with dark, vertically ribbed acoustic foam walls. He wears a white t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional silver microphone mounted on a black boom arm that bears the text " Rode ». In the initial sequence, the man looks forward with a neutral expression. As the scene progresses, he opens his mouth to speak, looking slightly to his left. He then shifts his gaze further to the left, continuing to speak, before returning his focus toward the center. His facial expressions change as he talks, and his right hand enters the bottom of the frame in the final sequence, gesturing as he speaks.
